sections.paragraph:
fut. יַחְתֹּר to break or dig through a wall, followed by בְּ Eze 8:8 12:5 , Eze 12:7with an acc. חָתַר בָּתִּים (the thief) breaks through houses, breaks into them, Job 24:16 to break through into, Amo 9:2, אִם יַחְתְּרוּ בִשְׁאֹל “if they break through into Hades.” Metaph. to break through the waves in rowing, to row. Absol. Jon 1:13.

Derivative, מַחְתֶּרֶת.
